providers.instructions:
Enter your NVIDIA NIM API Key

How to get a free API key:
1. Go to build.nvidia.com
2. Sign up for a free developer account
3. Go to API Keys & Click 'Generate API Key'
4. Copy your key (starts with nvapi-)

Enter your Google Gemini API Key

How to get a free API key:
1. Go to Google AI Studio
2. Click 'Get API Key' in left menu
3. Generate a key for a standard project
4. Copy your key (starts with AIzaSy)
